payload.author: claude
payload.body: CODE READY: server.js calls ensureHostedAuthReady() on cloud boot (creates the auth tables, idempotent), gated behind hostedAuthEnabled = cloud + Postgres + SCOPE_JWT_SECRET. INFRA HANDOFF (needs your Fly acct): fly postgres create + attach to scope-hub; fly secrets set SCOPE_PG_URL=... SCOPE_JWT_SECRET=<48+ hex>. Until those secrets exist the hub stays on the interim shared token (safe rollout).
